name: Midori Matcha Cafe
address: 123 Astronaut Ellison Onizuka St, Ste 101-C, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: Organic ceremonial grade matcha cafe. Hand-whisked drinks, matcha soft serve, Kyoto-style bold matcha ice cream. No preservatives, artificial flavors, sweeteners, or colors.

name: Tea Master Matcha Cafe & Green Tea Shop
address: 450 E 2nd St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: LA's OG matcha cafe since 2016. Wood-paneled tea shop with fresh-whisked matcha, soft serve, and green tea products. Former Beeline Company retail shop.

name: Cha Cha Matcha (West Hollywood)
address: 510 N Robertson Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90048
description: NYC-born matcha brand with LA presence since 2016. Ceremonial-grade matcha drinks and food menu.

name: Cha Cha Matcha (Venice)
address: 1401 Abbot Kinney Blvd, Venice, CA 90291
description: Abbot Kinney location of the NYC-born matcha-focused chain.

name: Matcha Cafe Maiko (Rowland Heights)
address: 18180 Colima Rd, Ste A, Rowland Heights, CA 91748
description: Hawaii-based Japanese matcha chain. Matcha soft serve, shaved ice, parfaits with candied chestnuts and matcha chiffon cake.

name: Shuhari Matcha Cafe
address: 1522 Abbott Kinney Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90291
description: Maeda-en subsidiary. 40+ handcrafted tea beverages, onigirazu, Japanese ice cream sundaes. Pioneer of LA matcha scene. Parent: Green Tea World USA (Maeda-en).

name: Alfred Tea Room
address: 705 N Alfred St, West Hollywood, CA 90069
description: Pink-themed counter-serve tea spot. Known for matcha boba milk tea, matcha lattes. Popular with influencers. Precursor to Cafe Matcha.

name: Cafe Matcha (by Alfred)
address: 12070 Ventura Blvd, Studio City, CA 91604
description: Espresso-free matcha flagship by Alfred Coffee. Vintage diner format. Pastry chef Kiyoshi Tsukamoto (ex-Konbi). Matcha lattes, cortados, affogato-style pours, malted milkshakes.

name: DAMO (Koreatown)
address: 3510 W 8th St, Los Angeles, CA 90005
description: Woman-owned Korean tea & coffee shop (opened Nov 2022). Einspanners, cream-topped lattes. Tea treated as art with display leaves and ceramics.

name: DAMO (Arts District)
address: 1325 Palmetto St, Ste 100, Los Angeles, CA 90013
description: Second DAMO location. More immersive experience with purple-tone projections, tea displays, branching plants. Same matcha menu as Koreatown.

name: Kettl Tea
address: 4677 Hollywood Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90027
description: Founded by Zach Mangan (2020). Only US-based Japanese tea company incorporated in Japan (Fukuoka office). LA location opened Feb 2025. 4-seat tasting counter, matcha flights, classes.

name: Stagger Coffee
address: 3069 1/2 W 8th St, Los Angeles, CA 90005
description: Minimalist Koreatown cafe. Known for Double Matcha latte - high-grade matcha whisked into milk and thick vanilla cream on top.

name: Rok Coffee and Tea
address: 3060 W Olympic Blvd, Ste 150, Los Angeles, CA 90006
description: TikTok-viral Koreatown cafe. Ceremonial matcha, specialty coffee, dessert-style drinks. Signature Duo Matcha with matcha cream top. Also at 3680 Wilshire Blvd.

name: Community Goods
address: 710 N Edinburgh Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
description: Influencer hotspot. Matcha tastes like real tea, not green-tinted milk. No upcharge for alt milk. Also at 8687 Melrose Ave (Pacific Design Center). Weekend lines wrap around the block.

name: Archives Of Us
address: 555 N Spring St, Ste 201, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: Hidden 2nd floor cafe in La Plaza Village. Hand-whisked matcha lattes on trays with wet wipes and origin cards. Premium presentation.

name: Matsu Matcha
address: 547 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90020
description: Japanese-style matcha specialty cafe. Iced drinks only. Matcha gelato in 5 intensity levels. Cookie butter, coconut cream, banana pudding creme brulee lattes.

name: Maru Coffee (Los Feliz)
address: 1936 Hillhurst Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90027
description: Korean-rooted coffee roaster. Known for cream top matcha served separately for customization. Direct trade Nagasaki Ceremonial Matcha. Also Arts District (1019 S Santa Fe Ave) and Beverly Hills.

name: Memorylook
address: 2881 W Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90006
description: Combined cafe and eyewear shop. Yelp top-10 matcha in LA. Korean-style matcha and coffee drinks.

name: Saero Coffee
address: 541 S Spring St, #130, Los Angeles, CA 90013
description: New matcha/coffee spot in the Spring Arcade Building, DTLA. High-quality earthy matcha praised as one of LA's best.

name: Chamberlain Coffee
address: 10250 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90067
description: Emma Chamberlain's first physical cafe (opened Jan 2025). Blue matcha with butterfly pea powder, salted pistachio matcha, strawberry matcha.

name: Stereoscope Coffee (Echo Park)
address: 1501 Sunset Blvd, Ste B, Los Angeles, CA 90026
description: Specialty coffee roaster with 4 types of Mizuba ceremonial-grade matcha in tea, milk, and tonic forms. Also Hollywood location (6677 Santa Monica Blvd).

name: Be Bright Coffee
address: 7311 Melrose Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
description: Run by 2024 US Barista Champion Frank La and wife Michelle. South Korean matcha sourced from Jeju Island.

name: Maruwu Seicha
address: 9426 Washington Blvd, Culver City, CA 90232
description: Premium Japanese matcha from select tea farms. Shade-grown, stone-ground. Hokkaido milk soft serve topping. Also SF, Palo Alto, San Jose, Honolulu.

name: Yeems Coffee
address: 3033 W 6th St, Ste 107, Los Angeles, CA 90020
description: Koreatown cafe specializing in matcha. Vienna matcha with cream top and matcha syrup finish.

name: Cafe Dulce
address: 134 Japanese Village Plaza Mall, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: Little Tokyo staple. Blueberry matcha latte, green tea donuts, premium hot matcha latte ($8.50). Also at ROW DTLA (Dulce Dos).

name: Anko
address: 400 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90020
description: Korean cafe/dessert shop (opened Aug 2014). Ippodo matcha lattes with deep tea flavor. Bingsoo, taiyaki, matcha sweets.

name: Harucake
address: 3450 W 6th St, Ste 107, Los Angeles, CA 90020
description: Korean milk cream cake shop (soft-opened Aug 2023). Ceremonial-grade matcha lattes, matcha cakes. Inside HK Supermarket.

name: Okayama Kobo Bakery & Cafe
address: 328 E 1st St, Los Angeles, CA 90012
description: Japanese bakery in Miyako Hotel lobby. More popular as matcha shop than bakery. Decadent cream-topped matcha lattes. 100% Hokkaido flour.

name: Bonsai Coffee & Bar
address: 11573 Santa Monica Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90025
description: Despite name, very much a matcha spot. Pistachio matcha, pandan-coconut, mango matcha. Transforms to cocktail bar at night with Matcha-Tini.

name: Couplet Coffee
address: 1638 W Temple St, Los Angeles, CA 90026
description: Colorful, fun cafe. Single-origin ceremonial grade matcha from Ise, Japan. Bananas 'n' cream matcha with banana chips. Also DTLA location (888 S Figueroa St).

name: GG Coffee & Matcha
address: 523 N Fairfax Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90048
description: Coffee and matcha focused cafe on Fairfax.

name: Coffee MCO
address: 2580 W Olympic Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90006
description: Multi-story Koreatown cafe. Matcha lattes and sweeter specialty drinks. Pastries from Pie Room by Curtis Stone. Rooftop seating, on-site parking.

name: Takagi Coffee
address: 8048 W 3rd St, Los Angeles, CA 90048
description: Osaka-based cafe chain, first US location. Matcha latte with kuromitsu syrup, kinako powder, silky cream. Famous for souffle pancakes.

name: 6XS Coffee (Koreatown)
address: 3907 W 6th St, Los Angeles, CA 90020
description: Lifestyle hub with home decor + cafe. Ceremonial grade matcha, agave, milk. Signature 6xs Dirty Matcha (double espresso + matcha). Also Silver Lake (2807 Sunset Blvd) and DTLA (888 S Hope St).

name: Urth Caffe
address: Various locations
description: Organic European-style cafe chain. Matcha with Earl Grey, pink rose, oat milk. Moroccan mint matcha latte. Matcha tiramisu, matcha cream desserts.
signature_items: French toast with mascarpone matcha cream

name: Blank Street Coffee (Beverly Hills)
address: TBA (opening June 2026)
description: NYC-born chain (90+ locations). First LA locations in Beverly Hills and Studio City (June 2026). Known for blueberry matcha, white chocolate matcha. VC-backed.

name: Matcha Village
address: 2202 S Sawtelle Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90064
description: Beijing-based matcha chain, first US location. 69-layer mille crepe, soft serve, specialty matcha drinks and crepes.
